name: Tempeh Chips with Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tempeh into 2 x 1/2 x 1/8-inch slices.
2. In a bowl, combine hot water, 2 tablespoons each of the tamari and lemon juice, salt, garlic, and coriander; stir until salt is dissolved.
3. Add tempeh; marinate for 15 minutes.
4. In a skillet, heat oil.
5. Fry tempeh until crisp; drain.
6. To make dipping sauce, combine remaining 2 tablespoons tamari, remaining 1 tablespoon lemon juice, and chili pepper. Makes 4 servings.
Available at health food stores.
Guest Demonstrator: Paul Onishi
CHERRY BLOSSOM FESTIVAL RECIPES (FEBRUARY 1995)
